description_long: This is a classic twin-bell alarm clock with a round metal body and two prominent bells on top, connected by a curved metal handle. The clock features a glossy black and copper finish, with three distinct faces: one with a floral pattern, one with a plain white face and black numerals, and one with a black face and white numerals. The clock stands on two thin metal legs and has a wind-up key and adjustment knobs on the back. The bells and hammer mechanism are clearly visible, giving it a vintage, mechanical appearance. The overall design is robust and functional, with a retro aesthetic that would stand out in a variety of settings.
description: A vintage twin-bell alarm clock with a glossy black and copper metal body, round face, and prominent bells on top. Features include visible wind-up keys, adjustment knobs, and a mix of numeral and decorative clock faces.
description_view_0: Three clocks are shown from the front, displaying different face designs: floral, plain white with black numerals, and black with white numerals.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the copper bells and the depth of the clock body, with the handle and hammer mechanism visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the clocks, including the wind-up keys, adjustment knobs, and the metal legs.
description_view_3: Angled front view focusing on the copper-finished clock, showing the face with orange hands and numerals.
attribute_face_design: Round face with either floral patterns, plain backgrounds, or bold numerals; some faces have decorative elements while others are minimalistic.
